get.description:
List Paperless documents with optional local derived state overlays.

The route preserves the upstream Paperless pagination contract for the
unfiltered path and falls back to local post-filtering when review-status
semantics require derived state from the local cache.
Return aggregate processing counters for the local document cache.
Return the cached dashboard payload used by the operations views.
Return the local document view with derived processing and review state.

post.description: Synchronize Paperless documents into the local cache and optionally queue embeddings.

get.description: Return the current document-sync progress snapshot from local sync state.

post.description: Request cancellation of the running document-sync job, if any.
Refresh one Paperless document locally and optionally enqueue or run embeddings.
Upsert one page of Paperless tags into the local metadata cache.
Upsert one page of Paperless correspondents into the local metadata cache.
Upsert one page of Paperless document types into the local metadata cache.
Ingest embeddings for a filtered document set, either inline or through the queue.
Ingest embeddings for an explicit list of local document IDs.

get.description: Search embedding chunks and optionally attach local document context to matches.
Return current embedding-ingest progress from sync state or queue statistics.

post.description: Request cancellation of the current embedding ingest run, if one exists.

get.description: Return queue length/progress plus paused state for the active worker queue.

post.description: Enqueue one or more document IDs for default worker processing.

get.description: Preview queued work items without removing them from the queue.

post.description: Clear the active queue by reusing the queue-cancel path.
Request queue cancellation for the current worker run.
Reset persisted queue counters without modifying queued items.
Pause queue consumption while keeping queued items intact.
Resume queue consumption after a pause.
Move a queue item from one index to another.
Move a queue item to the front of the queue.
Move a queue item to the end of the queue.
Remove one queue item by index.

get.description: Report worker-lock ownership and TTL details for queue debugging.
Return the task the worker currently marks as running, if any.

post.description: Reset the worker lock for recovery scenarios, optionally forcing the reset.

get.description: List dead-letter queue items for inspection and recovery.
List delayed queue items that are waiting for their retry time.

post.description: Clear all dead-letter queue items.
Move one dead-letter queue item back into the active queue.

get.description: List persisted worker task runs with filters for queue/ops inspection.
Return the stable worker error-type catalog exposed to the UI.
Return the consolidated application health/config snapshot.
Stream the consolidated app, queue, sync, and stats payload as server-sent events.

post.description: Answer a chat question against the local evidence/search stack.
Start a streaming chat answer using the same retrieval path as the non-stream endpoint.

schema.title: Response Chat Stream Chat Stream Post

post.description: Generate suggested follow-up questions from an existing answer and citation set.
Resolve citation snippets into richer evidence/page matches for the UI.

get.description: Preview pending writeback changes for one document or a paged selection.

post.description: Create a persisted writeback job from the current previewable changes.
